title: Input scripts for Accurate in silico predictions of modified RNA interactions to a prototypical RNA-binding protein with λ-dynamics
author: Angelo, Murphy
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: λ-Dynamics input files, topology and parameter files, and initial starting structures needed to reproduce the calculations discussed in the manuscript titled "Accurate in silico predictions of modified RNA interactions to a prototypical RNA-binding protein with λ-dynamics"
steps_raw: λ-Dynamics input files, topology and parameter files, and initial starting structures needed to reproduce the calculations discussed in the manuscript titled "Accurate in silico predictions of modified RNA interactions to a prototypical RNA-binding protein with λ-dynamics"
